segments.text: Everyone's obsessed with followers and views, but without this one underrated thing, you're guaranteed to fail. You know, when I'm looking at my content,
what's neat when a piece of content goes viral, what's much [music] more impactful is for me to go and look at the kind of people that are messaging me

around that piece of content. The kind of stuff that I saw that people were really resonating with was the stuff that was more, you know, behind the scenes getting into really how I was operating my team behind the scenes,
[music] how I was traveling the world and managing this portfolio of companies and the different struggles and wins I was having along the way. I found that
the more [music] I was sharing who I really was and what I was really going through, um the more that sort of vulnerability and that authenticity
um attracted and magnetized really awesome people towards Wait.
